commit_scope: Add disk-backed stale-while-revalidate endpoint caching with single-flight async refresh for automation usage/readiness/alerts/validation/daily-summary, plus regression tests and local latency verification for automation + usage page API dependencies.
evidence_refs: cd api && pytest -q tests/test_automation_usage_api.py -k 'cached_provider_readiness_payload_stale_refresh_singleflight or automation_usage_endpoint or provider_readiness_endpoint or automation_usage_alerts or provider_validation or daily_summary or snapshots'

cd api && ruff check app/services/automation_usage_service.py app/routers/automation_usage.py app/services/runtime_service.py app/routers/runtime.py app/services/telemetry_persistence_service.py tests/test_automation_usage_api.py tests/test_runtime_api.py
python local benchmark script for /automation and /usage API endpoints (cold + warm)

commands: cd api && pytest -q tests/test_automation_usage_api.py -k 'cached_provider_readiness_payload_stale_refresh_singleflight or automation_usage_endpoint or provider_readiness_endpoint or automation_usage_alerts or provider_validation or daily_summary or snapshots'

cd api && ruff check app/services/automation_usage_service.py app/routers/automation_usage.py app/services/runtime_service.py app/routers/runtime.py app/services/telemetry_persistence_service.py tests/test_automation_usage_api.py tests/test_runtime_api.py

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Automation/usage API calls are served from endpoint disk cache when fresh and stale responses trigger one async single-flight refresh per endpoint key.
test_flows: Benchmark all API calls used by /automation and /usage pages and verify warm-cache max latency < 500ms.
Verify stale cache path schedules exactly one concurrent refresh (single-flight).
